phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Kilometer Zero marker is
phrases.pronunciation: pehr-DOHN, DOHN-deh eh-STAH el kee-LOH-meh-troh SEH-roh

responses.english: On the ground, opposite the Post Office.
responses.phonetic: EHN EHL soo-EH-loh FREHN-teh AH kohr-REH-ohs
responses.french: En el suelo, frente a Correos.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the tourist information office is
phrases.text_local: Perdón, ¿dónde está la oficina de turismo?
phrases.pronunciation: Per-DON, ¿DON-day eh-STAH la oh-fee-SEE-na deh too-REE-smo?

responses.english: In the square, near the entrance.
responses.phonetic: HOON-toh AHL kee-LÓ-meht-roh THEH-roh AH LAH deh-REHTH-ah
responses.french: Junto al Kilómetro Cero, a la derecha.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Tio Pepe sign is
phrases.text_local: Disculpe, ¿dónde puedo ver el letrero de Tio Pepe?
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh PWEH-doh behr el leh-TREH-roh deh TEE-oh PEH-peh?

responses.english: At the top of the corner building.
responses.phonetic: EHN LAH eh-sk-EE-nah DEH ahl-KAHLÁ ahr-REE-bah
responses.french: En la esquina de Alcalá, arriba.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the Kilometre Zero marker is
phrases.pronunciation: dees-KOOL-peh, DOHN-deh es-TAH ehl kee-LOH-meh-troh SEH-roh
phrases.cultural_note: Kilometre Zero on Puerta del Sol marks the point from which all distances in Spain are measured — six national roads radiate from here.

responses.english: On the ground in front of the Comunidad building.
responses.phonetic: ehn ehl SWEH-loh FREHN-teh al eh-dee-FEE-syoh deh lah koh-moo-nee-DAHD.
responses.french: En el suelo frente al edificio de la Comunidad.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where the bear and strawberry tree statue is
phrases.text_local: ¿Dónde está la estatua del Oso y el Madroño?
phrases.pronunciation: DOHN-deh es-TAH lah es-TAH-twah dehl OH-soh ee ehl mah-DROH-nyoh
phrases.cultural_note: The bear reaching for the madroño tree is Madrid's emblem, depicted on the city's coat of arms since medieval times.

responses.english: On the east side of the square, by the metro.
responses.phonetic: ehn ehl LAH-doh ES-teh deh lah PLAH-thah, HOON-toh al MEH-troh.
responses.french: En el lado este de la plaza, junto al metro.
